name: Tuna St. Jacques
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Red or green bell pepper, chopped
1 can Tuna (12 oz), drained and in chunks (water -- packed better for you)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large microwavable bowl, combine mushrooms, bell pepper, and onions.
2. Micro-cook on High power for 2-1/2-4 minutes or until vegetables are tender, stirring once.
3. Stir in tuna, lemon juice, fine herbs, and salt. Set aside.
4. In a 2-cup microwavable measure combine milk, yogurt, and wine. Stir in flour until smooth.
5. Micro-cook on High power for 1-3 minutes or until mixture thickens and bubbles, stirring once.
6. Stir sauce into tuna mixture, combining well.
7. Spoon into 4 lightly greased individual microwavable baking dishes or 8 clam shells.
8. Sprinkle crushed croutons over tops; drizzle butter over croutons.
9. Cover loosely; micro-cook on High power for 3-6 minutes, or until heated through, rearranging dishes once.
10. Makes 4 servings.
Preparation time: 15 minutes
Calorie count: 266 calories per serving.
